Comfortable Accommodation: Rooms Huatulco in Santa Cruz Huatulco offers a sun terrace, garden, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Guests enjoy free WiFi throughout the apartment.
Modern Amenities: The property features air-conditioning, a kitchenette, private bathroom, and a work desk. Additional amenities include a terrace, balcony, and outdoor seating area.
Convenient Location: Located 14 km from Huatulco International Airport, the apartment is near Chahue Beach (1.9 km) and Downtown Huatulco/Crucecita (16-minute walk). Nearby attractions include Huatulco National Park (8 km) and Tangolunda Golf Course (7 km).
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for its swimming pool, room comfort, and room cleanliness. Private and express check-in and check-out services ensure a smooth stay.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel Casa Bocana in Santa Cruz Huatulco offers family rooms with air-conditioning, balconies, and private bathrooms. Each room includes free toiletries, a shower, and a wardrobe.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a saltwater swimming pool, sun terrace, and lush garden. The modern restaurant serves local and international cuisines with vegetarian options. Additional amenities include a bar, free WiFi, and a games room.
Prime Location: Located 24 km from Huatulco International Airport, the hotel is a 2-minute walk from La Bocana Beach. Nearby attractions include Tangolunda Bay (6 km) and Huatulco National Park (16 km).
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for its attentive staff, excellent restaurant, and inviting swimming pool.
